Belt of Inconsistency  
 

Lore Item No Trade

AC: 15
STR: +1 DEX: +1 WIS: +1 INT: +1 AGI: +1 HP: +70 MANA: +70 ENDUR: +70
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Belt of Inconsistency
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 15
STR: +1 DEX: +1 WIS: +1 INT: +1 AGI: +1 HP: +70 MANA: +70 ENDUR: +70
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Thats right it doesnt all make sense
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Srophkor
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 03:37:50
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Deck of Spontaneous Generation
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Belt of Inconsistency (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Belt of Inconsistency

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Plane of Mischief 1.0
Quest Name
The Gift Box
Used in 1 recipe.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Mischief 2.0


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
To those who are dumb (see below)
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2002 at 11:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252817760
Scholar
69 posts
*sigh* good to see there are still morons out there who make the rest of us look smarter. post-200 Int/Wis DOES mean something. Not sure about Wis casters, but as a wizard, every Int past 200 does in fact still give mana, but only 6 points of mana reguardless of level. Perhaps this will change with PoP, but I dunno. So that extra 55 Int means 330 extra mana. That's tremendous. With a wee bit o luck, that restriction will be raised as your Int raises past the 255 cap (PoP AA points) giving us potentially enormous amounts of extra mana. Melees out there, remember, that tiny little bit of extra mana could mean life or death to an entire raid force. Yes, I know that those extra HPs could mean the same, but this belt IMO would be best served on a caster. I'm a wizard, so you may think I'm biased. I would personally like to see this belt go to a cleric if it would be of benefit to them. I don't know what else is out there and available to them, but this would definitely be nice. My Loam Encrusted Sash will work fine for me right now.

Edited, Fri Oct 4 12:37:57 2002
▲ Page top
Not a caster item!
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2002 at 4:16 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Look! Weight is 0.0 and it has AC and resists! So it's gotta be a Monk item! Nobody but Monks need resists anyway and casters should have something better by then anyway. In fact, this is the only belt Monks can wear... yea, thats it! It's the only belt in the entire game that a Monk can wear, so the Monk should get it! In fact, you only need Monks to raid anyway. WTF are Tanks and Casters even going to the Planes for? Monks can handle it all by themselves! I saw a Monk solo Naggy once!

__DEL__1591780463989

Sadly, yes, I saw a monk solo Naggy and Vox...9 times total. He was lvl 52, and had no outide help. He did it all himself. 9 minute fight on Naggy. Solo. He was wearing this belt, BTW. I'll post the link when I find it again, and his magelo.

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 03 2002 at 8:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Haha
Hardly a joke
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752538177
View User Forum
186 posts
This would be very valuable to a caster and especially a necro. For necros, HPs means manna regneration. At level 53, I have to lich down to slightly more than 2 bubbles of life before I do a bond of death to get the most effecient manna regeneration (otherwise, part of the regeneration from BoD will get wasted) -- without any 3rd party buffs that is. So any +HP gear makes this process safer, and therefore, more viable. If I get SLN, I still have 3 bubbles of life when I bond.

Just standing (not medding at all) if I lich down to about 540points below my max and then cast bond of death on something, I will gain 1 bubble of manna from that alone. This whole process takes slightly less than 2 1/2 mins, so the extra HPs makes a big difference, especially when you can't cast BoD as soon as you might want to.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 31 2001 at 2:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is an ok item, but I think it really is meant to be a joke.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 09 2001 at 12:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) And + 70 mana is a huge boost.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 20 2001 at 7:52 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 70 mana is not great. Further more +1 in a stat boost is nothing either. I believe this item and items like it were meant as a joke. It's the plane of mischief for chrysake. Enchanters are the only one that are ultra efficient with spells enough that 70 can cast 2 spells still, but that's another story.

15AC 70HP 70mana belt is fooking GREAT for a caster.

not many items have 70 mana dude, try doing your homework.. only item I have that comes close is 0AC 75hp 50mana necklace from SKY plane..

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 09 2001 at 2:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why don't you grow a brain? If you were a caster who already had 200 WIS or INT you'd realize that anything over 200 doesn't do jack. At that point getting an extra 70 mana on an item would be a nice boost. You ever seen an item with 70 mana on it? I haven't. For a Shaman the extra 70 HPs would be a cannibalize as well. Max your WIS or INT and play the high end game before you tell people to grow a brain.

This is way off topic and should never have been posted here. When people check out these postings, it's for information about the item, not looking for some idiot whoring out his services. It's really great that you want to kill people, too. You might want to see a psycologist about your feelings of inadequacy causing you to lash out at others. Long story short, people are rating your posts as awful for the simple fact that they DO NOT belong here. Have a nice day.

One thing you lot really don;t seem to understand is that this quest is not about the items you get for combining the cards. These are merely intermediate stages. The final quest has not yet been solved. Until then, how about you keep your bickering to a minimum?

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 06 2001 at 12:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This belt sucks for a monk. All these little noob monks come on here "oo! AC and no weight! me want!" Well, it's stats suck, and that's what you should look for as a monk. You'll get hit less than with raw AC.
